text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening, while I'm walking through the
shopping district with Grass Wonder...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Look at that lively crowd. Is there an event taking
place?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand-prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I see... It's a raffle.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Which reminds me... Were you aware, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It's said that raffles were originally conceived by
the nobility long ago as a way to entertain
themselves.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
They would have people draw strips of paper with
letters on them and give out prizes like cloth and
string.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Aren't you well-informed! How about giving it a
go?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Well, why not? I just happen to have a raffle
ticket right here. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, you wouldn't mind if I try just once,
would you?
choice_data_list: Go get the grand-prize!
Go get the grand-prize!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'll do my best to not let you down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder firmly grasps the lever with both
hands and gives the raffle machine a spin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: What? R-really?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm overjoyed, truly, but I'm afraid I don't have
the time for a vacation at the moment.
choice_data_list:
Are you sure you couldn't find the time
somehow?

Are you sure you couldn't find the time
somehow?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Not right now, I'm afraid.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But I suppose once things settle down, I could use
this as an opportunity to reflect on the path I'll
have traveled thus far.
choice_data_list: So in other words, after the Twinkle Series?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes. That way, I'll be able to ascertain my level of
satisfaction with the path I've taken.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It would be the perfect time to take a step back
and reflect on my progress.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Would you come along with me too, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Are you sure you want me along?
Are you sure you want me along?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You're the one who has been with me every step
of the way.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Make it a promise, Trainer. It would strengthen
my motivation.
choice_data_list: Okay. I'm looking forward to it.
Okay. I'm looking forward to it.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I'll commit myself to training in
preparation for that day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take the hot spring ticket from her with an
affirmative nod.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: My, that looks delicious. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Add some grated Japanese radish sauce and I'm
sure it'll taste absolutely spectacular.
choice_data_list: Should we buy the sauce on the way home?
Should we buy the sauce on the way home?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I think I would rather buy the radishes and
make the sauce myself.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: So, could we visit the greengrocer instead?
choice_data_list: Sure.
Sure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The idea of making homemade sauce sounds so
good that my stomach starts grumbling.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe. It's almost dinnertime, after all.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Trainer, would you like to share it with me?
choice_data_list: Is that okay with you?
Is that okay with you?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes. ♪ Food is always more enjoyable with
company.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take Grass Wonder up on her offer and eat some
of the deluxe carrot hamburger steak with her.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Lucky indeed... This certainly is a lot of carrots.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Trainer, would you like a few of them? ♪
choice_data_list: Are you sure?
Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Of course. I'll also give some to Spe and El.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
And, since she does so much for me, perhaps
Tazuna, too.
choice_data_list: You'll be giving away a lot.
You'll be giving away a lot.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Well, yes. But hoarding them all to myself would
present a risk of overeating.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Sharing them is my best method of self-control. ♪
choice_data_list: Brilliant, as always.
Brilliant, as always.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Competition will be fierce for the foreseeable
future, so maintaining a perfect condition is key.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but don't worry. I won't neglect to keep a
portion for myself, either! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Impressed by her self-discipline, I return to the
academy with Grass Wonder.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the
third-prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I set my hopes too high, it seems.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Then again, this might be just what I needed.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I forgot to purchase carrots for tonight's salad at
the supermarket earlier today, so the timing
couldn't be better.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
True, true. You might've been wishing for a carrot
the whole time, and you just didn't know it!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
So, you mean... fate may have had a hand in this,
too?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: In that case, this could very well be my grand-prize.
choice_data_list: That worked out nicely, Grass.
That worked out nicely, Grass.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It really did. ♪ Tonight's salad is going to taste
that much better.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder gains some hop in her step as we
head back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Well, this is disappointing. I had hoped for an
actual prize of some sort.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Winning raffles must be quite the rare occurrence.
choice_data_list: Have you not played much before?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I haven't. I never had the opportunity before
coming to Japan, you see.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Before I tried, I thought it would be enough fun
just to spin the tumbler, but...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Losing stings a lot more than I expected...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Hey, don't get so down on yourself. Better luck
next time.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: If you say so...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grass Wonder's shoulders sink as we head back.
